name: @krone9/pi-superpowers
description_en: Process-discipline skills bundle for pi (brainstorming, systematic debugging, TDD, plans, verification, worktrees, parallel agents). Inspired by Claude Code's superpowers plugin.
description_zh: pi 的流程纪律技能包（头脑风暴、系统化调试、TDD、计划、验证、工作树、并行代理）。受 Claude Code 的 superpowers 插件启发。
